summary_markdown:
**Training Report Oct 27–Nov 02**
✅ 4 rides | TSS 590 | Avg IF 0.74
📈 EF trending up (1.31 vs 1.26 prior block)
⚠️ HR drift elevated on Sunday long ride (5.1%)
🎯 On track for aerobic base target
narrative_markdown:
## Week Overview

Solid week with 4 rides totalling 590 TSS. The standout session was Tuesday's 92-minute effort at IF 0.81 — power was well-distributed with 58% in Z2 and HR staying controlled at 142 bpm average.

## Key Observations

**Aerobic Efficiency** improved to 1.31 (up from 1.26 in the prior block), confirming the Z2 emphasis is paying dividends.

**Endurance Durability** showed a slight regression — HR drift on the Sunday 3-hour ride reached 5.1%, suggesting fatigue accumulation mid-week. Recommend a lighter Wednesday to avoid this in the next block.

## Recommendations for Next Block

1. Keep Tuesday's threshold session but cap at 60 minutes to manage fatigue.
2. Extend Sunday's long ride gradually — target 200+ minutes in 2 weeks.
3. Add one Tempo interval (3×10 min at Z3) mid-week if recovery permits.
